# Lee Corleison Design

> Product architect working across brand design, product design, and full-stack engineering. Based in New Zealand, working with founders across Aotearoa and Australia.

## About Lee Corleison

Lee Corleison is a product architect with over 20 years shaping brands and the products they become — brand identity, product design, and the engineering to ship them. He carries the whole line himself, from the first mark to production code.

As Executive Creative Director and shareholder at Paloma, one of ANZ's leading venture studios, he led brand and product across a venture portfolio now valued north of AUD $500 million — spanning fintech, healthtech, proptech, SaaS, and consumer.

He designed the early Afterpay app, which became an overnight success. He has also designed for DreamWorks, MAC, AB InBev, and Air New Zealand. Today he works directly with founders as an independent studio.

## Core Services

- **Brand Design** — Brand strategy and positioning, naming, logo and identity systems, visual identity, art direction, brand architecture, messaging, guidelines
- **Product Design** — UX/UI design, product design, design systems, interaction design, prototyping, user research, product strategy, design ops
- **Full-Stack Engineering** — Front-end and full-stack build, React / Next.js, TypeScript, APIs and integrations, performance, production engineering, shipping

## Selected Work

Brands and products designed and, in many cases, built end-to-end:

- **Tracksynk** — music sync platform — https://tracksynk.com/
- **Paloma** — venture studio — https://palomagroup.com/
- **Geodde** — https://geodde.com/
- **Klippr** — https://klippr.ai/
- **Gondola** — https://gogondola.com/
- **Planna** — https://www.yourplanna.com.au/
- **Authsignal** — fintech authentication — https://authsignal.com/
- **Enjoy a Sipper** — consumer beverage brand — https://www.enjoyasipper.com/
- **Nextwork** — https://www.nextwork.org/
- **Sucasa** — no-deposit home loans

## Experience

- **Lee Corleison Design** — Principal (ongoing) — brand, product, and full-stack engineering, direct with founders
- **Paloma** — Executive Creative Director & Shareholder (2018–2026)
- **Afterpay** — Product Designer (2015–2017) — designed the early app experience
- **Carnival Labs** — Mobile Product Design (2011–2015) — mobile products for Air New Zealand, DreamWorks, Kraft Foods, MAC Cosmetics, and AB InBev
- **1-night.co.nz** — Brand and product design, Shareholder (2008–2010) — creator of New Zealand's most advanced event ticketing and management software
- **Massey University** — Bachelor of Design, BDes (2005–2008)

Based in New Zealand (Aotearoa). Works with clients across New Zealand, Australia, and internationally.
